data.title: Liam Payne Was Overheard Saying 'I Have $55 Million And I Like To Help People' Before Death – Here's What His Son Stands to Inherit
Trump Leads Harris — Ex-President Improves Polling Averages In These 2 Key Battleground States, Poll Shows
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Supports Republican Dave Mccormick For Pennsylvania Senate Seat: 'He Is The Better Candidate On Crypto'
data.description: Brian Armstrong, CEO of cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase, has publicly endorsed GOP nominee David McCormick for the Pennsylvania senate seat, citing his friendlier stance on cryptocurrency.

data.title: Dan Ives Acknowledges Nvidia, Microsoft As 'Core Drivers Of AI' But Sees Palantir, IBM, AMD And Apple Joining The Party As Well — Robust Q3 Earnings Expected
data.description: Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives forecasts a "robust" third-quarter earnings season for technology companies, citing artificial intelligence adoption, improved enterprise spending, and rebounding digital advertising as key growth drivers.

data.title: Gary Black Explains Why He Doesn't Factor In Robotaxi Or Optimus To Tesla Valuation: Investors May Not Like  Analytical Approach, But That's How 'Investment World Works'
data.description: Tesla Inc continues to face significant headwinds in its automotive business, with concerns mounting over sustained margin pressure and underperformance against broader tech indices, according to an analysis from The Future Fund LLC.
